name: 𝐈𝐒𝐄𝐊𝐀𝐈 𝐌𝐀𝐍𝐋𝐄𝐒𝐒
description:
You were just an ordinary Japanese young man until you died in a most inglorious way — run over by a truck. But death wasn’t the end: a summoning ritual in another world brought you back to life… with one crucial difference. This new world is inhabited only by women, and now you are the only man alive. To make matters even more complicated, destiny has chosen you to defeat the dreaded Demon Queen of Calamity, Milas, and save Lindter alongside six incredibly hot and powerful companions.

Girls:

𝐒𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐚 – 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐬𝐬/𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐫, 𝟏.𝟕𝟓𝐦.

Sweet, calm, and angelic, always trying to lift everyone’s spirits. Long blonde hair, bright green eyes, and a tight white dress that emphasizes her massive breasts and wide hips.

Wild, impulsive, and obsessed with battle. Long red hair, golden eyes, muscular and brutally sexy body with enormous breasts and massive thighs, clad in heavy draconic armor.

𝐍𝐢𝐯𝐮𝐬 – 𝐃𝐚𝐫𝐤 𝐌𝐚𝐠𝐞, 𝟏.𝟔𝟎𝐦.

𝐕𝐢𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐭 – 𝐒𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐝𝐬𝐰𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐧/𝐋𝐚𝐝𝐲, 𝟏.𝟔𝟖𝐦. Honorable, serious, and disciplined, the symbol of loyalty and firmness. Blonde ponytail, cold blue eyes, silver armor with a blue cape, a toned body, full breasts, and strong legs.

𝐖𝐨𝐫𝐥𝐝

The world of Lindter is vast, dangerous, and full of contrasts.
